[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000010 2
1 0000111 3
2 1111000 4
3 1111010 5
4 0011100 3
5 0111001 4
6 1101010 4
7 1110001 4

01 10 1100000 2
12 21 1000000 1
23 32 0000010 1
34 43 0000000 a
45 54 1111000 4 match 2

67 76 0011000 2
70 07 0101000 2

72 27 0000000 a
